title: gouldia cordata var. nealiae
intro: Gouldia cordata var. nealiae, also known as Nealia's gouldia, is a plant species found in Hawaii, and it belongs to the family Myrtaceae. The medicinal properties of Nealia's gouldia include its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a potential natural remedy for colds and flu. Nealia's gouldia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but more research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
